ogTitle: Hotham Heights vs Hotspur: Climate Safety

heading: Hotham Heights vs Hotspur — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hotham Heights, Victoria and Hotspur, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hotspur has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hotham Heights (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hotham Heights or Hotspur safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hotham Heights has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Hotspur scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hotham Heights scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Hotspur scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hotham Heights or Hotspur?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hotspur has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
